name: Simulation
label: Simulation     world + 3 LLM personas + shared environment + HTTP
description: A simulated world with three independent LLM-powered personas and a shared environment. Personas can look around, talk to each other, and remember things. Ticks every 30 seconds. HTTP endpoint to send messages.
readme:
# {{name}}

{{description}}

## Entity tree

```
{{tree}}
```

## Setup

```bash
{{setup}}
```

Add your OpenAI API key to `.env`:

```
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...
```

## Run

```bash
pnpm dev
```

The world ticks every 30 seconds. Each persona decides what to do on each tick.

## Interact

Send a message to a persona:

```bash
curl localhost:3000/message -d '{"to": "alice", "text": "What are you thinking about?"}'
```

entities.description: Simulated world with independent personas and shared environment
entities.describe: Simulated world at tick ${this.tick}. 3 personas with shared environment. HTTP on :3000.

entities.description: Shared environment — provides awareness and communication between personas
entities.describe: Shared environment. Personas can look around and talk to each other through here.

tools.name: look
tools.description: See who is around in the world
tools.body:
const people = ['Alice', 'Bob', 'Carla'].filter(n => n !== input.viewer);
    return `You see ${people.join(' and ')} nearby.`;

tools.name: sayTo
tools.description: Say something to another person by name
tools.input: { from: string; to: string; text: string }

entities.description: Alice — a curious and analytical persona
entities.describe: You are ${this.name}, ${this.personality}. Use environment to look around and talk to others. Use memory to remember things.

tools.name: hear
act
tools.body:
const result = await this.invoke({ message: 'What do you want to do next?' });
    return String(result);

entities.description: Bob — a friendly and creative persona
entities.describe: You are ${this.name}, ${this.personality}. Use environment to look around and talk to others. Use memory to remember things.

tools.name: hear
act
tools.body:
const result = await this.invoke({ message: 'What do you want to do next?' });
    return String(result);
